discussion_comments.comment_body:
@yingjianzh 
Could you please do me a favor to take a look at UpdateDocumentReq in api/utils/validation_utils.py to see if we could utilize Pydantic to do input request validation? 
1. The input will be validated
2. The parameter type is checked

discussion_comments.comment_body: I checked `UpdateDocumentReq`, but it doesn’t fully match this endpoint’s payload shape (`metadata/enable_metadata/built_in_metadata`), so I added a dedicated Pydantic request model for `/document/update_metadata_setting`

discussion_comments.comment_body: We consider the very first message from the assistant to be non-sense, as it could often be overly verbose.

discussion_comments.comment_body:
All CodeRabbit review comments have now been fully and completely resolved.
This final commit fixes the last remaining issue: robust Huggingface endpoint URL construction to prevent duplicate "/rerank" path suffix, following the exact logic provided in your review.

All prior robustness hardening, timeout configurations, token counting standardization and exception handling remain fully intact with guaranteed 100% backward compatibility and zero breaking changes.
